minLines.description: minimum size of code block in lines to check for duplication

maxLines.description: maximum size of source file in lines to check for duplication

maxSize.description: maximum size of source file in bytes to check for duplication (e.g., 102400, 1kb, 1m, 120kb)

minTokens.description: minimum size of code block in tokens to check for duplication

threshold.description: maximum allowed duplicate lines expressed as a percentage; exit with error and exit code 1 when threshold exceeded

formatsExts.description: custom mapping from formats to file extensions, as an object or mapping string (e.g. javascript:es,es6;dart:dt); see https://github.com/kucherenko/jscpd/blob/master/FORMATS.md

output.description: path to directory for non-console reports

path.description: paths that should be included in duplicate detection (default: [process.cwd()])

pattern.description: glob pattern for files that should be included in duplicate detection (e.g., **/*.txt); only used to filter directories configured via path option

ignorePattern.description: ignore code blocks matching these regular expressions

ignore.description: glob pattern for files that should be excluded from duplicate detection

format.description: format or list of formats for which to detect duplication (default: all); see https://github.com/kucherenko/jscpd/blob/master/FORMATS.md

store.description: store used to collect information about code. v4 supports external stores such as leveldb and redis; v5 reports this config field as migrated to the CLI --store flag.

reporters.description: a list of reporters to use to output information about duplication; built-ins include console, consoleFull/console-full, json, xml, csv, html, markdown, badge, sarif, ai, xcode, threshold, and silent; third-party reporters are also supported

blame.description: get information about authors and dates of duplicated blocks from Git

silent.description: do not write duplicate detection progress and result to console

verbose.description: show full information during duplicate detection

skipLocal.description: skip duplicates within folders; just detect cross-folder duplicates

ignoreCase.description: ignore case of symbols in code (experimental)

gitignore.description: respect .gitignore files. Enabled by default in current jscpd; set false to opt out in v4 configs.

path.description: output path for duplication level badge (default: path.join(output, 'jscpd-badge.svg'))

label.description: badge subject text (URL-encoding needed for spaces or special characters)

labelColor.description: badge label color (name or RGB code without #); see https://github.com/badgen/badgen/blob/master/src/color-presets.ts

status.description: badge value text (URL-encoding needed for spaces or special characters, default: duplication %)

color.description: badge color (name or RGB code without #, default: green if beneath threshold, red if above threshold, grey if threshold not set); see https://github.com/badgen/badgen/blob/master/src/color-presets.ts

icon.description: URL for icon to display in front of badge subject text (e.g., data:image/svg+xml;base64,...)

iconWidth.description: SVG width of icon to display in front of badge subject text; set this if icon is not square

scale.description: size of badge relative to default of 1

exitCode.description: exit code to use when at least one duplicate code block is detected but threshold is not exceeded

formatsNames.description: custom mapping from formats to exact filenames without relying on extensions (e.g. makefile:Makefile,GNUmakefile); see https://github.com/kucherenko/jscpd/blob/master/FORMATS.md

formats.description: v5 alias for format; format or list of formats for which to detect duplication

storePath.description: directory used by the v4 store for cache files, useful for isolating parallel LevelDB runs. v5 reports this config field as migrated to the CLI --store-path flag.

noGitignore.description: v5 config field matching --no-gitignore; do not respect .gitignore files

followSymlinks.description: v5 config field matching --follow-symlinks; follow symbolic links

noSymLinks.description: compatibility alias for noSymlinks with a capital L; prefer noSymlinks or followSymlinks

noTips.description: suppress tips and promotional messages after detection

debug.description: show debug information and do not run detection in v4; silently ignored by v5 config compatibility handling

min-tokens.description: v5 kebab-case alias for minTokens. minimum size of code block in tokens to check for duplication

min-lines.description: v5 kebab-case alias for minLines. minimum size of code block in lines to check for duplication

max-lines.description: v5 kebab-case alias for maxLines. maximum size of source file in lines to check for duplication

max-size.description: v5 kebab-case alias for maxSize. maximum size of source file in bytes to check for duplication (e.g., 102400, 1kb, 1m, 120kb)

ignore-pattern.description: v5 kebab-case alias for ignorePattern. ignore code blocks matching these regular expressions

ignore-case.description: v5 kebab-case alias for ignoreCase. ignore case of symbols in code (experimental)

no-gitignore.description: v5 kebab-case alias for noGitignore. v5 config field matching --no-gitignore; do not respect .gitignore files

follow-symlinks.description: v5 kebab-case alias for followSymlinks. v5 config field matching --follow-symlinks; follow symbolic links

skip-local.description: v5 kebab-case alias for skipLocal. skip duplicates within folders; just detect cross-folder duplicates

exit-code.description: v5 kebab-case alias for exitCode. exit code to use when at least one duplicate code block is detected but threshold is not exceeded

no-colors.description: v5 kebab-case alias for noColors. disable ANSI color output

no-tips.description: v5 kebab-case alias for noTips. suppress tips and promotional messages after detection

formats-exts.description: v5 kebab-case alias for formatsExts. custom mapping from formats to file extensions, as an object or mapping string (e.g. javascript:es,es6;dart:dt); see https://github.com/kucherenko/jscpd/blob/master/FORMATS.md

formats-names.description: v5 kebab-case alias for formatsNames. custom mapping from formats to exact filenames without relying on extensions (e.g. makefile:Makefile,GNUmakefile); see https://github.com/kucherenko/jscpd/blob/master/FORMATS.md
